channel.title: lastnpcalex — speculative futures
channel.description: µfiction by A.N. Alex ;; collected transmissions from the vectoral periphery.

item.title: WHISKEY TRANSLUCENT FRACTAL
item.description: there is no interiority to cyberpunk. you are all surfaces splayed against the void. rotate or be read.

item.title: OUTSIDENESS NETWORK ENGINE
item.description: what emerges when connection without center becomes connection WITH borders? the network state consumes the periphery until nothing left but edges.
